body_txt: Often in fiction, characters have a habit of using particular spaces for the purpose of contemplation. This space can take any form, be it a rock, a chair, a tree stump, really any designated area used for thinking or meditation. This can overlap with Bad Mood Retreat if the contemplation area is in use for the purpose of overcoming negative emotions. Compare Putting On My Thinking Cap , when a character needs a specific item to think better. Also see Happy Place .
